case_title: SON NGUYEN VS. ROCHELLE TABANIAG et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-11-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-27-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-02-2012. THE JUN-11-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUL-12-2012.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-04-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUN-04-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. APR-09-2013 ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-16-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-27-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR RUSSELL SAMUEL ROECA APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-13-2012 THROUGH OCT-11-2012.
